summary: Added 59 new regression tests across 9 test files plus new export-doc.test.js. Also exported 7 previously private functions (parseSitemapXml, inScope, parseRobots, extractLinks, addBacklink, assembleDocMd, deepMerge) and fixed 3 real bugs discovered by the tests: (1) buildFrontmatter in export-html.js produced invalid YAML for titles containing ': ', (2) extractLinks in mirror.js did not filter data: URI hrefs, (3) parseSitemapXml in sitemap.js threw on malformed XML instead of returning empty.
